metadataRefresh.datasetDiscoveryTooltip: How often Dremio will scan the root path for new Delta tables

elements.label: Default Partition Column (optional)
elements.tooltip: Column used to partition new tables created via CTAS

elements.label: Allow Schema Evolution on Write
elements.tooltip: When enabled, INSERT with extra columns will update the Delta schema automatically

elements.label: Target File Size (bytes)
elements.tooltip: Target Parquet file size per write. Default 134217728 = 128 MB.

elements.label: Write Buffer Rows (per thread)
elements.tooltip: Rows buffered per writer thread before flushing to Parquet. Reduce for very wide rows.

elements.label: Read Batch Size (rows per Arrow batch)
elements.tooltip: Rows returned per Arrow batch during SELECT. Default 4096 matches Dremio's standard batch size.

elements.label: Snapshot Cache TTL (seconds, 0=disabled)
elements.tooltip: Seconds to cache the active file list per table. Uses version-check + TTL strategy. Connector writes always invalidate the cache immediately.
